name: Doyon @Ignister
name_jp: ドヨン<ruby lang="jp"><rb>＠</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アット</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>イグニスター
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 "@Ignister" monster in your GY; add it to your hand. If this card is sent to the GY as material for the Link Summon of a Cyberse monster: You can target 1 "A.I." Spell/Trap in your GY; add it to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Doyon @Ignister" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 "@Ignister" monster in your GY; add it to your hand. If this card is sent to the GY as material for the Link Summon of a Cyberse monster: You can target 1 "A.I." Spell/Trap in your GY; add it to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Doyon @Ignister" once per turn.
eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 "@Ignister" monster in your GY; add it to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Doyon @Ignister" once per turn.

action: Activates if used as Link Material
